title: Emulsification module for use with a food processor
abstract: An emulsification module for a food processor enables the careful and methodical introduction of ingredients (e.g., oil) into the main container, thus allowing the same to emulsify the ingredients. The emulsification module includes a container (120) configured to be removably connected to, and rotate with, the rotating blade assembly (106), and one or more oil dispensers (128) positioned on a side surface thereof. The centrifugal forces generated by the rotation of the blade assembly causes the oil in the container (120) to be propelled up the inside walls of the same and come out of the oil dispensers (128) and drizzle down the side walls of the main container. Whisk members (130, 132) positioned on the bottom of the container (between the blades of the blade assembly) assist in mixing of the drizzled oil with the ingredients to achieve the desired emulsification.
claims: Claims CLAIMS  What is claimed is: 1. An emulsification module for a food processor, the food processor having a drive mechanism (102) positioned on a main container (108) and a blade assembly (106) connected to the drive mechanism and which rotates in response to actuation of the drive mechanism, the emulsification module comprising: a container (120) configured to rotate with the blade assembly and having one or more oil dispensers (128); and at least one whisk element (130,132) positioned on a bottom of the container. 2. The emulsification module according to claim 1 , wherein the container (120) comprises a toroid shape configured to removably fit onto a shaft of the blade assembly. 3. The emulsification module according to claim 1 , wherein the one or more oil dispensers comprises one or more holes (128) in a peripheral side of the container (120). 4. The emulsification module according to claim 1 , wherein said at least one whisk element comprises a U-shaped member (130) attached to a bottom of the container via the legs of the U-shaped member and a spring (132) around a base of the U- shaped member. 5. The emulsification module according to claim 3, wherein the one or more holes (128) are positioned on the side of the container such that oil is dispensed when the container is rotated with the blade assembly due to centrifugal forces generated by the rotation. 6. The emulsification module according to claim 2, wherein the at least one whisk element (130, 132) comprises two whisk elements, each being disposed on opposing sides of the bottom of the container such that when the container is positioned on the shaft of the blade assembly, the two whisk elements are positioned between opposing blades of the blade assembly. 7. An emulsification module for a food processor, comprising: a container (120) configured to fit within a main container (108) of the food processor and rotate with a blade assembly (106) selectively driven by a drive mechanism (102) releasably attached to the main container (108), the container (120) having one or more oil dispensers (128); and at least one whisk element (130, 132) positioned on a bottom of the container. 8. The emulsification module according to claim 7, wherein the one or more oil dispensers (128) comprises one or more holes in a peripheral side of the container. 9. The emulsification module according to claim 7, wherein said at least one whisk element comprises a U-shaped member (130) attached to a bottom of the container via the legs of the U-shaped member and a spring (132) around a base of the U- shaped member. 10. The emulsification module according to claim 8, wherein the one or more holes are positioned on the peripheral side of the container such that oil is dispensed from the same in response to centrifugal forces generated when the container is rotated.
